basic_details.job_title: Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Cine Assistant, Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager
basic_details.short_information: Kerala Public Service Commission (Kerala PSC) has released the official Cine Assistant, Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager Notification 2026 on 30 April 2026 at the official website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced under the Kerala PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 43 years with qualifications such as SSLC or equivalent, Degree, DCA/Diploma in Computer Application, MBA, PGDCA, and relevant experience can apply online from 30 April 2026 to 03 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 43 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per para 2(i) of General Conditions; maximum upper age limit 50 years; provisional hands up to 5 years age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC or equivalent, Degree, DCA/Diploma in Computer Application, MBA, PGDCA, Relevant experience
qualification.details: Cine Assistant: SSLC or equivalent + Two years experience in the Camera section of a reputed film studio. Junior Assistant: Degree in any discipline + DCA/Diploma in Computer Application (minimum 6 months) from Govt. recognised institute. Assistant Manager: Degree in any discipline + MBA (regular course) + PGDCA (regular course) + 2 years experience in supervisory cadre after acquiring MBA.

salary_details.details: Cine Assistant: ₹ 18,000 – 41,500/- Per Month Junior Assistant: As per company rules Assistant Manager: ₹ 55,200 – 1,15,300 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Kerala PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Kerala PSC to complete the application.
